series_metadata.series_description: Files created during the development, re-design or modification of any OOD network, application or system. Records may include: project management records; status reports; draft system or sub-system specifications; draft user requirements and specifications; or any additional record deemed useful within the process.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Maintain while system is in use three (3) state fiscal years year system goes out of service. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Paper: Maintain while system is in use three (3) state fiscal years year system goes out of service. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
